description_long: This kiosk consists of a three-tiered wooden display rack filled with neatly arranged, bagged products labeled 'Polska Krówka' and a large, metallic milk canister positioned beside it. The display rack features horizontal black rails supporting the shelves, and a decorative cutout resembling a splash of milk at the top. The milk canister is cylindrical, metallic, and has a wooden handle and a lid with individually wrapped candies or products on top. The overall color palette is neutral, with light wood, black accents, and metallic silver. The signage is printed directly on the product bags and the canister, both reading 'Polska Krówka' in a stylized font. There are no windows or doors, and the structure is open and accessible from the front.
description: A wooden display rack with three shelves of bagged products and a large metallic milk canister labeled 'Polska Krówka' beside it. The kiosk features a decorative milk splash cutout and black rail accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full display of bagged products on three shelves, the decorative milk splash cutout, and the labeled milk canister with candies on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves, the arrangement of the bags, and the cylindrical shape of the milk canister with its handle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back panel of the display rack and the back of the milk canister, with no visible products or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the side profile of the shelves and the canister, with the product arrangement visible from the side.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign on product bags and metallic canister, both reading 'Polska Krówka', placed on the front of the bags and the canister.
attribute_roof_design: Flat top with decorative milk splash cutout, made of wood or similar material, no overhangs or awnings.
attribute_architectural_style: Functional, rustic-commercial with simple, utilitarian design and minimal decorative elements.
